positive: A stylized, whimsical woodland animal gathering. Focus on a group of interconnected forest creatures—a fox, a squirrel, an owl, and a rabbit—silhouetted against a twilight sky. The style should be modern, minimalist folk art with heavy black outlines and vibrant jewel-toned color pops (sapphire, emerald, amethyst). The composition must be perfectly centered and balanced, suitable for a circular print area on apparel. Use a symmetrical arrangement with layered elements. The background should be a highly stylized, graphic depiction of stylized autumn foliage and gentle starlight. Clean lines, high contrast, and graphic poster aesthetic. Vector illustration quality, maximum detail.
negative: blurry, noise, artifacts, extra limbs, bad anatomy, text, signature, logo, watermark, low resolution, washed out, grayscale, faded, amateur, messy
